title: Italian-Style Crusty Bread
description: A classic Italian bread made with a crispy crust and soft interior, perfect for dipping in olive oil or sauces.
instructions: 2. Slice the crusty bread into 1-inch thick slices.
3. Place the bread slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
4. Drizzle the olive oil over the bread slices.
5. Sprinkle the magical pinch over the bread.
7. Bake the bread in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
8. Remove the bread from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
